name: Greek Pasticio
recipeIngredient: 1 package Pasta, cooked al dente (454 gms)
1 can Whole tomatoes, chopped-and liquid drained
recipeInstructions:
1 Prepare ahead of time. Let cool completely.
2 While the topping is cooling, prepare the pasta and meat filling.
3 Cook the pasta until tender but firm. Do NOT overcook!
4 Brown the meat with the chopped onions and garlic in a separate pan.
5 Add the spices (oregano, basil, allspice, cinnamon), sugar to taste, and the drained tomatoes to the meat mixture. Simmer for 30-45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6 Mix in the cooked pasta and transfer to a baking pan.
7 To make the topping, melt the butter (or margarine) in a saucepan and mix with flour to form a paste.
8 Add milk to the butter-flour mixture and heat at medium, stirring constantly until it thickens.
9 When the mixture is thickened, stir in the Parmesan cheese and crumbled feta cheese. Stir until melted. Use about 2 tablespoons of Parmesan and approximately 6 ounces of feta.
10 Let the topping cool completely before adding the beaten eggs.
11 After the eggs are stirred in, pour the egg mixture over the meat and pasta.
12 Bake at 350-375°F for about 45 minutes or until brown.
This dish is similar to moussaka due to the topping.
